docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-31-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ELENA JACKSON APPEARED THROUGH SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT ANGELICA SISNEROS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-21-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, ANGELICA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QUINTERO, ANGELICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, ANGELICA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY JACKSON, ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, ANGELICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-31-2017 AT 8:30AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION DEFENDANT CORRECT LAST NAME FILED BY DEFENDANT QUINTERO, ANGELICA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-13-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ELENE JACKSON IS PRESENT. ASSITED BY SHANNON RAINTREE , CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - WRONG NO ONE WITH THIS NAME) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, ANGELICA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF SC-100 AND AN UNSERVED SC-104 PROOF OF SERVICE MAILED TO DEFENDANT. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ELENA JACKSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGLEICA QUINTERO IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES ARE ASSISTED BY MANTI HENRIQUEZ, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WIAVES SERIVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
